briefing: Markets were mildly negative today with NASDAQ -0.6% and S&P 500 -0.1%, a neutral-to-soft session with no clear risk-on signal. Per strategy lessons, we're holding our $777 cash rather than forcing a buy into a lukewarm tape, and letting the 6 existing positions ride under their automatic stop-loss/profit-target rules.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A 'risk-off' day is when investors pull back from riskier bets (like growth stocks) in favor of caution, often without any single bad news event triggering it. On days like this, disciplined investors avoid chasing trades and instead hold cash, waiting for clearer signals before committing new capital.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「避險」（Risk-Off）是指投資人在缺乏明確利空消息的情況下，仍選擇減少對成長股等高風險資產的曝險，轉為保守觀望。在這樣的日子裡，有紀律的投資人會避免追高，選擇持有現金，等待更明確的訊號再進場。

market_education.summary_en: Broad indices drifted slightly lower today without a single dominant catalyst, reflecting a quiet consolidation phase after recent gains. NASDAQ underperformed the S&P 500 slightly, suggesting mild profit-taking in growth names rather than a broad risk-off move. With no strong momentum signals confirmed by volume and multi-indicator alignment, conditions favored patience over new commitments.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大盤指數普遍小幅下滑，未見單一明確的催化因素，反映近期升勢後的整理階段。納斯達克表現略遜於標普500指數，顯示成長股出現輕微獲利了結，而非全面性的避險拋售。由於缺乏成交量與多項技術指標共同確認的強勁動能訊號，目前情勢較適合按兵不動，而非貿然加碼。
